data.description: EU TELLS MEMBERS THAT A PROLONGED IRAN CRISIS WILL CAUSE EXTREME ENERGY PRICE SPIKES AND FORCE DEMAND CUTS, EU DIPLOMATS SAY

data.title: ZEC set to break $420 in 10 days: Zcash at $358, with smart money 62% short, creating potential for squeeze.
data.description: Zcash currently stands at $358, presenting a classic breakout setup driven by oversold derivatives and high demand in the market. The sizable 62% short position taken by smart investors sets the stage for a potential explosive surge towards a target exceeding $420.

data.title: Virginia law mandates holding unclaimed crypto in-kind for minimum one year, limiting quick sale.
data.description: Virginia has enacted a new law that includes digital assets in unclaimed property regulations. This law mandates the transfer of digital assets in-kind and imposes restrictions on the state's ability to sell them promptly. The law aims to address the increasing significance of digital assets in unclaimed property, safeguarding individuals' rights and interests. This regulation will impact various stakeholders involved in managing unclaimed property, ensuring compliance with the state's requirements. The law signifies Virginia's proactive approach towards adapting to the evolving landscape of asset ownership, with significant implications for individuals and organizations dealing with unclaimed digital assets in the state.

data.title: GIGGLE likely to correct with target at $30 in two weeks after hitting high of $56.68. Momentum fading indicates pullback to $28-32 support zone.
data.description: The recent surge in GIGGLE saw a significant 53% increase, with the stock price reaching $56.68 before experiencing a retreat. This sudden spike is indicative of classic blow-off top behavior. The technical momentum has now begun to diminish at exceptionally high levels, indicating a potential pullback. Analysts predict a pullback to the support zone between $28 and $32.

data.title: BNB nears $617 as altcoin season heats up; could rally to $700 resistance. Charts hint end of accumulation phase.
data.description: The cryptocurrency BNB is currently trading around $617, remaining stable as Bitcoin faces challenges. This stability could indicate a possibility of BNB making a move towards the $700 resistance level. Technical analysis suggests that the current phase of accumulation may be coming to an end, signaling potential growth for BNB in the near future.

data.title: Central bank of Pakistan allows banks to open accounts for licensed crypto firms after years-long ban, signaling move towards regulated framework.
data.description: Pakistan's central bank has lifted restrictions and now permits banks to open accounts for licensed virtual asset service providers. This move signifies a significant shift towards a regulated framework after years of limitations.

data.title: Expect 'MiCA 2' to be considered as EU reviews existing rules, seeking input from industry players to shape the future of crypto regulation.
data.description: European Union officials are intending to review the Markets in Crypto-Assets (MiCA) regulation as companies are experimenting with its boundaries. Industry input will play a crucial role in shaping possible adjustments to the European Union's cryptocurrency framework.

data.title: Kyobo Life Insurance partners with Ripple for Korea's 1st blockchain bond settlement pilot, part of Seoul's tokenized securities plan by 2027.
data.description: Ripple and Kyobo Life Insurance have introduced South Korea's initial blockchain-powered government bond settlement pilot program. This development comes as Seoul gears up for the launch of a new tokenized securities framework scheduled for 2027.

data.title: DOGE's price might drop 30% to $0.06 due to consolidation break as it hovers around $0.09. Summer could test $0.06 support.
data.description: The cryptocurrency DOGE is currently trading at approximately $0.09, exhibiting a pattern of sideways movement that typically leads to notable decreases in value. This trend suggests that the meme coin may be approaching a critical juncture in the summer, with a possibility of testing support levels at $0.06.

data.title: OKX introduces X-Perps in Europe via Malta MiFID business, offering up to 10x leverage and multi-asset collateral.
data.description: The latest offering from the exchange is now accessible in the European Economic Area through its MiFID business headquartered in Malta. Users can enjoy leverage of up to 10x and collateralize multiple assets.

data.title: HYROX and Amazfit Strengthen Alliance With Global Three-Year Partnership
data.description: Amazfit, a prominent global smart wearable brand under Zepp Health, has unveiled a new three-year global partnership with HYROX, the renowned World Series of Fitness Racing. This collaboration marks a significant expansion from a previous regional agreement to a comprehensive worldwide alliance. The enhanced partnership aims to elevate the experience of HYROX athletes and participants in training, racing, and recovery by offering an extended range of exclusive smart wearable options. The agreement includes various smart watch categories, contributing to a more integrated and advanced fitness experience for users worldwide.

data.title: Bunge to Present at BMO Global Farm to Market Conference
data.description: In St. Louis, Bunge made known that its company management will engage in a fireside chat at the upcoming BMO Global Farm to Market Conference. No specific numbers were mentioned in the announcement.

data.title: Aeva Announces Date for First Quarter 2026 Results and Conference Call
data.description: Aeva®, a pioneer in advanced sensing and perception systems, is set to release its first quarter 2026 results after the market closes on May 6, 2026. Following this, a conference call and webcast to review the results will be held at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time (5:00 p.m. Eastern Time) on the same day. The event, titled Aeva Technologies, Inc. First Quarter 2026 Results Call, presents an opportunity for stakeholders to gain insights into the company's performance.

data.title: Ziff Davis to Announce First Quarter 2026 Earnings
data.description: Ziff Davis, Inc. (NASDAQ: ZD), a leading company, is set to announce its First Quarter 2026 Earnings report on Thursday, May 7, 2026, at 6:00PM ET. An invitation is extended to the public, press, financial community, shareholders, and interested parties to tune in for a live audio Webcast of the earnings call on Friday, May 8, 2026, at 8:30AM ET. The call will be hosted by Vivek Shah, the CEO, and Bret Richter, the CFO. This event presents a valuable opportunity to gain insights into the company’s performance during the quarter.
Reynolds Consumer Products will release Q1 financials on May 6, 2026.

data.title: USANA Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: USANA Health Sciences, Inc. (NYSE:USNA) based in Salt Lake City revealed that their first quarter 2026 results will be disclosed post-market closure on Tuesday, May 5, 2026. Upon the distribution of the earnings release, the company will make available its Management Commentary document on the Investor Relations webpage (http://ir.usana.com) in the News/Events segment. Furthermore, USANA is scheduled to host a conference call for analysts and institutional investors to elaborate on the announcement.

data.title: Moloco Launches AI-Powered Performance CTV for App Marketers, Bringing Mobile-Grade Measurement and Optimization to the Living Room
data.description: Today, Moloco, a prominent AI advertising company based in Menlo Park, California, unveiled the introduction of Moloco Ads for Performance CTV. Leveraging the advanced AI technology that has propelled Moloco to the forefront of mobile performance advertising, this new launch marks a significant expansion into the realm of Connected TV (CTV). This move offers app marketers a fresh opportunity to boost downloads and engagement in the living room, a space with tremendous consumer attention. The introduction of Performance CTV by Moloco signifies a breakthrough in real performance advertising in a previously untapped market segment.

data.title: FlightHub Launches The Lounge: a Travel Content Hub Built to Convert Curiosity Into Trips
data.description: FlightHub, a prominent online travel agency in North America, has introduced FlightHub Lounge, a platform dedicated to travel content. The Lounge aims to guide travelers seamlessly from choosing a destination to booking their trip, all in one place. Available for free on both desktop and mobile at https://lounge.flighthub.com/, The Lounge offers a variety of original editorial content across eight categories. It also includes a discovery map based on destinations, featuring handpicked articles and travel inspiration. Additionally, there is a podcast and documentary available on the platform.

data.title: BXP Completes More Than 200,000 Square Feet of Leasing in San Francisco’s South Financial District
data.description: In San Francisco, BXP (NYSE: BXP) revealed a significant development where they secured over 200,000 square feet of new leases at properties located in the South Financial District. With these agreements, 50 Hawthorne has reached full occupancy while 680 Folsom is now over 90% leased. This indicates a growing trend in the area, reflecting its vibrant market conditions. Noteworthy tenants include Dropbox, a prominent cloud-based content collaboration platform.
